TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ksunu' Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Ksunu' a niyaro', 71 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 245 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 231 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kso~u~uno~u~uʡ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u kso~u~uno~u~uʡ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Ksunu' Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Ksunu' a niyaro', 71 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 245 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 231 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 14 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kso~u~uno~u~uʡ itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u kso~u~uno~u~uʡ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
